title: Insight AI funnel design — ScoreApp lead funnel + tier pricing
html:
A handwritten/typed wireframe titled "INSIGHT AI" — Yahir designing the Insight AI funnel as a scoreapp-built quiz that scores a business's AI presence (e.g., "Your AI Presence score is 8/100"), shocks them with FOMO ("99% of businesses don't talk in AI, be there first"), shows competitor benchmarks, and routes to two tracks: highly-qualified → 1-on-1 high-ticket call; not-so-qualified → tiered self-serve ($14.99/mo DIY weekly insights → $99/mo done-for-you for 1–50 employees → $500–1000/mo for 50+).

TL;DR

  • insight ai formalizes the aeo agency thesis as a productized lead funnel — the missing piece from the Oct-18 Diddles partnership chat.
  • Funnel mechanic: free scoreapp AI-presence quiz → score reveal → competitor compare → upsell ladder, with a 14-day free trial as the wedge.
  • Three pricing tiers (DIY $14.99 → DFY $99 → Premium $500–1000) explicitly mapped to company size, with hundreds of prompts tracked at the top tier — same shape that peekaboo already ships at $100–200/mo (discovered five days later).
  • Bridges directly into the visual dashboard mockup from the same evening.

Key quote

"99% of businesses don't talk in AI, be there first."

Why it matters in the graph

This is the moment the aeo agency stops being a $45/mo hosting + AEO retainer (Sept-22 sketch) and becomes a tiered SaaS funnel — a real shape Yahir could pitch. It is also one week before he stumbles on peekaboo doing the same thing professionally, which becomes the Nov-18 visibility-decline screenshot.

Open questions

  • Did scoreapp ever get spun up, or did the discovery of peekaboo make it redundant?

insight ai · aeo agency · scoreapp · peekaboo · ai search optimization · ai visibility engine · yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026
